mechanism: Basis trade unwind constitutes Phase 2 (leveraged unwind) of the stress sequence. Loss of cheap repo financing triggers pro-cyclical deleveraging via Brunnermeier-Pedersen liquidity spiral, amplifying initial plumbing stress into broader Treasury market dysfunction and forcing central bank intervention.
regime_dependence: Active when repo rate volatility exceeds basis trade carry at current leverage. Currently at 3-4x March 2020 scale. Position concentration (top 10-15 funds hold 60-70%) amplifies the discontinuity.
